Child's Tear  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Child's Tear
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-13 22:49:07
Page Updated:Tue May 2nd, 2017

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Fear
NPC Name
Iksar broodling

Quests

This item is used in quests.

Butcherblock Mountains
Quest Name
Shaman Epic: Spear of Fate

Ocean of Tears
Quest Name
Shaman Epic: Spear of Fate

The Field of Bone
Quest Name
Shaman Epic: Spear of Fate

The Rathe Mountains
Quest Name
Shaman Epic: Spear of Fate

Plane of Fear

Edited, Dec 24th 2013 7:05am by Shuraz

# Apr 25 2010 at 8:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592272860019
6 posts
if golems in fear are not up and you want this, best time to get it is when dragons dragons dragons task is up, killed the golems there and iksar broodling will spawn kill it and loot the tear. Just got mine today!. well good luck!

Ornate Velium Pendant trick FALSE
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2009 at 12:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592782028630
Scholar
37 posts
Charming Lord Rak`Ashiir with Ornate Velium Pendant does not work, brings faction to amiably and ally is required in order to MQ.
▲ Page top
Any class can MQ
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2007 at 3:43 AM Rating: Decent
shadowsedge
Scholar
298 posts
Did the turn in to the "The Fabled Rak' Ashiir" and he spawned the shaman epic version. I did not use any other additional faction modifiers and did the turn in's up to the wolf in EJ till I had the message that my faction with true spirit could not get any better.

Turn in done on BB server by Wood elf ranger with max ally faction.
Did 2nd MQ for another shaman with Dwarf Cleric, Max Ally faction.
I am guessing if you can get the faction done that any class can do the turn in.
Please rate this post.

Can use Sneak if behind the quest giver in butcherblock and in Freeport to turn in the gem. Doesn't take many (50 or less?) to get to max ally faction and the best part is you faction never takes a dive cause it's only on the final turn in that you take the negative faction hit.

If you can't sneak, get a chanter to help you the first time. Have the enchanter make a pet out of the "lesser spirit" in butcherblock so your faction becomes indifferent. Say "I wish to know more" to get a "tiny gem" Then turn in the gem to the guy in freeport but DO NOT hit trade. Have the enchanter invis you so you faction becomes indifferent. Hit trade and your all set to do on your own.

Edited, Mar 27th 2007 12:32am by shadowsedge
____________________________
I know you believe you understand what you think I said, but I am not sure you realize that what you thought you heard was not what I meant.

MQ = Multi Quest

my question is can ONLY shm's MQ this item? i looted because there were none in zone and I thought it an awful waste if it could be MQ'd, I was told by 1 shaman that I could MQ it by raising TS faction and he said I could do that by turning in copper's to someone but I can't remember who that was or find any info on it... since it seems that Shm's, Sk's and Ench's all use TS faction in their epics at one point could I do something as a mage to raise mine?

RE: MQ'd
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2007 at 1:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592302899661
View User Forum
57 posts
not true anymore..

SKs with max true spirit faction can do it, i just did tonight.

Trick is once u have max faction, u can't do turn in...but if u kill councelors in icewell keep, they drop the velium ornate necklace,which is an all/all clickable alliance,4 charges..use this on on rak, and u can mq tear.
▲ Page top
On MQ's
QuoteReply
# May 12 2004 at 2:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800682351
12 posts
Good news: Yes it is possible to MQ this.

Bad news: The hand in to Lord Rak requires that you have MAX true spirit faction (not just ally, you need to keep gaining faction until it says your faction could not get any better)

More bad news: When ANY shaman hands in their tear, their faction is reset to indifferent. Sooo .. having an epic shaman makes no difference to the hand in. You MUST have someone hand it in with MAX true spirit faction as descibed above.

There are 2 ways of getting your true spirit faction maxxed. The first is ofcourse completing every part of the epic quest up until the point of going to fear to get the childs tear. The second way is to complete a few early pieces of the epic quest and then just repeat any part of the quest you prefer over and over, gaining some faction each time.

The first is suprisingly quicker, if you have the means this can easily be done in one night and this is my reccomendation. The second, while easier, I have found takes alot longer. I presume you get more faction for different parts of the quest.

Now recall I said earlier, once you hand in your tear, your faction is reset to indifferent. Whats this mean for you? Well, all that faction you worked so hard for, is down the drain each and every time you complete the MQ. On the plus side, the final hand in (the piece you loot from Rak to hand into the spirit in the lake) requires no faction, so the MQee doesn't really have to do anything.

As for the golems, all 3 of the golems can possibly spawn the iksar child, however 'most' of the time I have found you will only get 2.

I hope that helps
▲ Page top
MQ only by Shaman?
QuoteReply
# May 03 2004 at 12:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787527816
5 posts
if mq, who hands in first the newb or the mqr? Would imagine would be the mqr then the newb.
Also, is it absolute fact that only an epic shaman can do? Or can any epic tune do the turn in?
Also for the first post, Hostle, wanted to mention that it is far easier to go in after the zone has been cleared. We did less than an hour after the zone was cleared by an uber guild. We got 3 child tears in less than an hour. So dont give up.

MQ it!!!
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2003 at 11:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758961202
60 posts
Can be MQ'd. An epic'd shaman can do the handin' to Lord Rak (kill black reavers to get em to pop) in CoM. Have the noob (non epic'd) shaman loot rak's scale and do handin. Check faction before handin is done, should be ally.
▲ Page top
Shaman Epic Piece
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2003 at 9:18 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592759302866
4 posts
The iksar is spawned after killing any one of the three golems in the Plane of Fear.

If you happen to be on a raid where no-one needs this, check to see if any shaman you know does and invite them over to loot it. It serves no purpose to anyone else, and I am sure the shaman would be VERY grateful

Edited, Mon Sep 8 22:22:45 2003
